working_on: Issue close-out campaign C4: MemPalace effectiveness pair. Close Issues #38 (mechanize boot search with three-formulation reformulations + similarity filter into engine/session/current_plan.md) and #39 (instrument drawer-citation telemetry at shutdown — scan outcome_summary + diary entry + commit messages for drawer IDs / S-NNNN refs / tag-named refs; new soft-warn mempalace_zero_citations_after_search). End-to-end mechanization across both surfaces; in-place ADR 0056 amendment block (single S-0093 entry covering both issues).
declared_scope: Issue #38 boot-search orchestrator: new tool engine/tools/mempalace_boot_search.py + tests; subprocess-driven via python3 -m mempalace search with three formulations (literal/conceptual/adjacent); similarity ≥0.6 filter; JSONL telemetry shim into current_mempalace.jsonl; idempotent ## Prior context section in engine/session/current_plan.md. Issue #39 citation telemetry: new sibling tool engine/tools/scan_mempalace_citations.py + tests; pattern matching (drawer IDs / S-NNNN / tag-named refs); writes nested mempalace_citations block under mempalace_activity. validate.py extension: new soft-warn mempalace_zero_citations_after_search (search_calls > 0 AND citations.total == 0). ADR 0056 in-place amendment block + decision drawer. Layer 1 ops-doc updates (mempalace-operations + session-build-lifecycle + routine-mode-operations + session-shutdown-sequence + soft-warn-lifecycle + tools-validate-interpretation). Skill body updates per ADR 0044 doc-then-skill flow (session-build-lifecycle + routine-mode-lifecycle + session-shutdown-sequence). gh issue close 38 39. Standard shutdown. health_check_overdue soft-warn fires (slots_since=16 vs cadence=10) per campaign deferral; recorded in outcome_summary. phase: NA-engine-apparatus
outcome_summary: Closed Issue #38 (boot-search orchestrator) and Issue #39 (drawer-citation telemetry) end-to-end per ADR 0056 S-0093 amendment. New tool engine/tools/mempalace_boot_search.py (449 LOC + 27 pytests) — three formulations (literal/conceptual/adjacent) via mempalace.mcp_server.tool_search with min_similarity=0.6; idempotent ## Prior context section in engine/session/current_plan.md; JSONL telemetry shim mimicking PostToolUse hook output (orchestrator imports tool_search directly so search_calls would NOT increment without compensation — important architectural point recorded in the decision drawer). Sibling new tool engine/tools/scan_mempalace_citations.py (310 LOC + 27 pytests) — runs at shutdown step 8b after diary write + outcome_summary fill; scans three sources (outcome_summary, today's diary via tool_diary_read, git log eager-claim..HEAD) for three regex patterns (drawer IDs / per+from+at+in+see S-NNNN / per pushback+lesson+decision drawer); writes nested mempalace_citations block under mempalace_activity. validate.py extension: new soft-warn mempalace_zero_citations_after_search (search_calls > 0 AND citations.total == 0) gated on session id ≥ S-0093 per the same legacy-archive-compatibility logic the structural-fields audit uses. Validator check count rises 17 → 18. ADR 0056 amendment: single in-place block (no supersession; 5th amendment in sequence after S-0087, S-0089, S-0090, S-0091 — see lesson-named in diary about amendment density growing); cross-mode coverage table; cascade analysis (additive only). 6 Layer 1 ops doc updates + 3 Skill body updates per ADR 0044 doc-then-skill flow. 923 engine/tools tests pass; mypy --strict + ruff check + ruff format clean across all touched files. Cold-context Layer 3 review per ADR 0038 returned zero contract-vs-code drift across the three production deliverables (sub-agent verdict, all three sections matched). Decision drawer captured at paideia/decisions per the two-layer-decision-recording rule (drawer_paideia_decisions_b583b22e17599be2d621a183) — per the contract that decisions land in two places (ADR + MemPalace). Live boot-search dry-run against this session's work item returned 15 drawers above the 0.6 threshold — verified end-to-end against the live MemPalace. Closes 2 issues (#38 + #39); per S-0086 audit recommendations (Issue #38 + #39 originated from the audit follow-up window); informed by S-0091's amendment lesson per pushback drawer (LOUD body uniformly across modes; user pushback contains both AND requirements). Health-check audit deferral continues per campaign plan — health_check_overdue soft-warn fires (slots_since=16 vs cadence=10, overdue by 6); cadence-fired audit runs in dedicated post-C7 session. MemPalace MCP confirmed live throughout: 8+ search_calls, 1 diary_read, 1 diary_write, 1 add_drawer, ≥1 status across the session.

scope_delivery.explanation: Yes — the full declared scope landed cleanly. Issue #38 boot-search orchestrator + 27 pytests; Issue #39 citation scanner + 27 pytests; validate.py new soft-warn + 6 pytests in TestZeroCitationsAfterSearch; ADR 0056 in-place amendment block + decision drawer; 6 Layer 1 ops doc updates + 3 Skill body updates per ADR 0044 doc-then-skill flow; gh issue close 38 39 (38 auto-closed by Closes directive in feat commit body); standard shutdown. All 923 engine/tools tests pass, mypy --strict + ruff clean, cold-context Layer 3 review zero drift. Single architectural choice surfaced mid-session — using mempalace.mcp_server.tool_search via python library import rather than CLI subprocess (cleaner shape; required telemetry shim to compensate for PostToolUse hook bypass). Recorded in decision drawer + diary.

side_discoveries.reasoning: The string 'pending' appears in the resolve_work_item docstring of engine/tools/mempalace_boot_search.py describing the resolution order ('auto_target.json pending task name (routine pre-claim)'). It is documentation of the resolver's behavior — the resolver matches `status == "pending"` tasks per ADR 0051's auto_target.json schema — not a deferred TODO marker. No action needed.
